title: jonas-fuchs/ViralPrimerSchemes: v.0.1
author: Jonas Fuchs
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: First release that includes evaluated and non-evaluated primer schemes for tiled sequencing and qPCR of various highly variable virus. Primers were exclusively designed with varVAMP!
steps_raw: First release that includes evaluated and non-evaluated primer schemes for tiled sequencing and qPCR of various highly variable virus. Primers were exclusively designed with varVAMP!
